text:
- update to 5.1.09
- remove stale mirrors
- remove WITH_VIEWER Makefile option and related files, because gui support was dropped upstream
- remove md5


It was reported to work fine by Joseph Maxwell <jaymax36 at gmail dot com>, who originally requested this update there: 
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2011-January/065487.html

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
